channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: We picked the 24 best Big Spring Sale deals that are under $50
item.description: Despite the fact that spring isn’t often associated with big discounts, Amazon seems keen to turn every season into one filled with savings. Case in point? The retailer is currently hosting a spring sales event, which will run through 2:59AM ET on April 1st. Retailers like Best Buy, Walmart, and Newegg have also hopped aboard […]

item.title: Sur YouTube, l’IA de Google remplace les titres et embrouille tout
item.description: Pour Google, l'IA est soluble dans n'importe quoi. Y compris là où ça n'a vraiment aucun intérêt comme sur la page d'accueil de YouTube ! Chez plusieurs utilisateurs, les titres des vidéos sont remplacées par des résumés IA du contenu. Une expérimentation contre-productive, en plus des hallucinations et raccourcis hâtifs habituels de l'IA générative....

item.title: Déjà plus de 100 € de réduction pour le tout nouveau MacBook Air 13 à la sauce M5 (et Wi-Fi 7)
item.description: Le MacBook Air 13 renfermant une puce M5 vient juste de sortir, mais on le trouve déjà moins cher sur Cdiscount. Sur la plateforme, cet ultraportable léger et polyvalent est affiché à 1 094 euros au lieu de 1 199 euros averc un code promo.

item.title: Secure your data with a massive 75% off the price of Carbonite cloud backup
item.description: This time-limited offer covers any of the three Carbonite Backup plans, including Basic, Plus, and Prime Plan.

item.title: My most played game of 2026 is now so cheap it equates to just 7p per hour of entertainment — but the offer only lasts for a limited time
item.description: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 is massively discounted right now over at Amazon.

item.title: Motorola’s Razr Ultra 2026 might be a hair thicker than last year’s version
item.description: While most flagship phones have been steadily getting slimmer over recent years, the upcoming 2026 version of the Motorola Razr Ultra could end up being a bit chunkier than its predecessor. Leaked measurements of the phone shared by XpertPick and OnLeaks on Thursday show that it will be slightly thicker than the 2025 version, about […]

item.title: Returning from a humanitarian aid trip to Cuba, Americans have phones seized at US airport
item.description: Members of a convoy that delivered humanitarian aid to Cuba were detained and interrogated by Customs and Border Protection (CBP) upon returning to the United States on a charter flight from Havana. Of the 20 US citizens who were pulled for secondary inspection at Miami International Airport on Wednesday morning, 18 had their phones and […]

item.title: Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware
item.description: The tech giant's claim that it has not seen any successful spyware attacks targeting Apple devices with Lockdown Mode enabled comes amid a leak of hacking tools targeting users running devices with older software.

item.title: Comment Razer revient en arrière pour aller de l’avant avec son nouveau Blade 16
item.description: Razer annonce cette semaine le millésime 2026 de son iconique Blade 16. À défaut d'un changement de design, l'appareil troque son ancien processeur AMD Strix Point pour une puce Intel Panther Lake flambant neuve... assortie de la mémoire vive la plus énervée du marché.

item.title: Doctors Struggle to Spot AI-Generated X-Rays, Raising Scam Risks
item.description: In tests, radiologists struggled to discern genuine X-rays from AI-generated fakes.

item.title: English learning app used by Sony and Paramount put millions of users at risk
item.description: Five million Japanese have had their recordings leak to the internet through a misconfigured Google Cloud database.

item.title: Fuite géante chez Anthropic : pourquoi le futur Claude inquiète déjà ses créateurs
item.description: Anthropic a mis au point une nouvelle version surpuissante de Claude. Cette nouvelle itération, considérée le modèle « de loin le plus puissant » jamais entraîné par la start-up, suscite même les inquiétudes d'Anthropic. Selon l'entreprise, Mythos pose des « risques de cybersécurité significatifs ».

item.title: Summer heat will turn any gaming room into a sauna — and that's why I'm investing in a new portable AC early
item.description: Hot summer days while indoors can be a rough experience, especially for gamers, and that's why investing in a new portable AC now makes sense.

item.title: TCL et Bang & Olufsen lancent la barre de son A65K et renouvellent la gamme audio de la marque
item.description: TCL est connu pour ses téléviseurs mais la marque propose aussi des barres de son, notamment le modèle A65K marquant le début de la collaboration entre le géant chinois et Bang & Olufsen. À cela, ajoutez un rafraîchissement complet de la gamme de barres de son S et de l’ajout d’un caisson de basses au système home cinéma Z100 Dolby Atmos FlexConnect. ...

item.title: What Do You Mean Glen Powell Is Fox McCloud in the ‘Super Mario Galaxy’ Movie
item.description: Which means you have to watch Glen Powell do 'Star Fox' cosplay, naturally.

item.title: The photo mode consultant helping you take better video game screenshots
item.description: Three children stare at the dilapidated remains of a battlefield, with trees and man-made structures mostly razed to the ground, save for the sturdy frame of a lone trebuchet. It's a pensive snapshot of the bloodshed in A Plague Tale: Innocence by virtual photographer Ludovic "Shinobi" Helme - but it's no mere screenshot. It's a […]

item.title: These ‘clinically tested’ gummies may or may not help you poop
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. Influencer after influencer says the same thing about Grüns. The gummy vitamins are delightful, chockful of whole organic […]...

item.title: TCL dévoile sa nouvelle gamme de TV SQD-Mini LED et son premier téléviseur RGB Mini LED
item.description: C’est l’heure de l’officialisation et de la découverte de toutes les caractéristiques techniques mais également des prix pour les nouvelles séries de TV TCL avec les technologies SQD-Mini LED et RGB Mini LED au programme.

item.title: « Un véritable fossé » : les promesses de BYD sur son système de conduite autonome mises à mal par les clients
item.description: Les voitures électriques et hybrides de BYD sont toutes vendues en Chine avec un système de conduite semi-autonome, baptisé God's Eye. Une prouesse technologique sur le papier, mais les capacités réelles interrogent.

item.title: Meta’s court losses could be just the beginning
item.description: Social media companies have long seemed impervious to legal threats. Meta, YouTube, Snap, and the rest have long waved off criticism of their platforms on free speech and Section 230 grounds. But twice this week, juries rendered verdicts against the platforms, not because of some bad videos but because of the design and structure of […]

item.title: 300 millions de dollars : les jeux AAA coûtent une fortune aux États-Unis
item.description: L’une des industries les plus lucratives du monde est également l’une des plus chères pour ses développeurs et son public. Dans un contexte de crise économique, cette hausse des coûts de développement interroge sur l’état du milieu.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Live updates on the top deals
item.description: Get real-time updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: This Winter Fly Is Doing Something Scientists Didn’t Think Was Possible
item.description: Unlike most bugs, snow flies thrive in the cold—thanks to a baffling mix of genetic kinks that scientists never expected to find.

item.title: La nouvelle version des messages RCS intègre les appels vidéo
item.description: Les messages RCS vont continuer de s'enrichir avec le nouveau profil universel 4.0. Une des nouveautés majeures sera la possibilité de passer des appels vidéo directement depuis son application de messagerie, même si elle n'intègre pas une telle fonction. Reste maintenant aux constructeurs et aux éditeurs à s'emparer de cette spécification, ce qui risque de prendre du temps....

item.title: iPads are selling out fast in Amazons Spring Sale: Grab iPads starting at $299
item.description: Shop the best iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. One M3 iPad Air has never been cheaper.

item.title: The PS5 is getting more expensive... again
item.description: It was only last August that Sony raised PS5 console prices in the US, blaming a "challenging economic environment" at the time. Today it has slightly tweaked the phrasing to "continued pressures in the global economic landscape," but the outcome is the same: price rises across the board, this time even affecting the PS Portal handheld. Starting April 2, the price of the standard PS5 (that’s the one with the disc drive) is going up to $650. That’s a whopping $100 hike, or $150 if you go back to before the August price increases. The Digital Edition is getting the same increase, up to $600 from...

item.title: Sony Is Hiking PS5 Prices for the Second Time in Less Than a Year
item.description: The era of game consoles getting cheaper over time is over.

item.title: Skip the TSA Line: Where to Find Travel by Bus, Train, and Boat
item.description: These apps and websites find bus, train, and ferry tickets when you want more options than flying to your destination.

item.title: Senate strikes a deal to fund TSA. Here’s where ICE and other agencies stand on the budget impasse
item.description: The House of Representatives is expected to consider the deal on Friday. The Senate early Friday morning approved Homeland Security funds to pay Transportation Security Administration agents and most other agencies, but not the immigration enforcement operations at the heart of the budget impasse that has jammed airports, disrupted travel and imposed financial hardship on workers.The deal, which the Senate approved unanimously without a roll call, next goes to the House, which is expected to consider it Friday.“We can get at least a lot of the government opened up again and then we’ll go from ...

item.title: SpaceX IPO: What we know about the initial public offering as the eagerly awaited stock listing date nears
item.description: A historic listing from Elon Musk’s rocket company would be one of the most closely watched IPOs in years. Here’s the latest. With some of the largest and most influential tech giants planning to go public this year, 2026 is shaping up to be the year of the mega IPO.

item.title: Netflix en avril 2026 : Stranger Things revient dans ce nouveau catalogue ! Voici les films et séries à ne pas rater
item.description: Quand bien même c'est le printemps, le froid et les rhumes jouent les prolongations. Alors pour continuer à passer des soirées au chaud à la maison, voici ce que Netflix a concocté pour le mois d'avril.

item.title: The 4.5-star Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 'knock it out the park' — and now you can save £50 with this code
item.description: Upgrade your audio with this £50 discount on the Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, which brings them down to £169 when you use the limited-time code.

item.title: C’est officiel : la PS5, PS5 Pro et le Portal sont plus chers en France
item.description: Hélas, la rumeur se confirme : Sony augmente les prix des consoles PS5, PS5 Pro, PS5 Digital Edition et PlayStation Portal.

item.title: Après le trafic de puces IA vers la Chine, Nvidia est à nouveau sous pression
item.description: Depuis quelques jours, l'entreprise de puces électroniques est à nouveau sous pression : deux sénateurs américains (Jim Banks et Elizabeth Warren) demandent à grand bruit que Nvidia suspende ses ventes de puces d'IA de pointe destinées à la Chine et à des pays intermédiaires d'Asie du Sud-Est... après l'arrestation de trois personnes accusées d'être impliquées dans un trafic de semi-conducteurs....

item.title: 'Congress is way behind where it should be in understanding the nature of this revolution and its impacts': New bill from Bernie Sanders and AOC wants to try and pause US data center construction
item.description: Sanders and AOC are proposing to ban data center construction while the US gets to grips with AI regulation.

item.title: My favorite Dell laptop deal for business professionals and students is back under $500 right now
item.description: Dell 15 Laptop delivers solid everyday performance for studying and remote work and it's currently selling for under $500.

item.title: Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Lite : cette nouvelle trottinette abordable est déjà moins chère avec ce code promo
item.description: La Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Lite est la déclinaison la plus accessible de la nouvelle gamme de trottinettes électriques de la marque. À peine sortie, elle est encore moins chère que d'habitude : Cdiscount la propose à 314,99 euros au lieu de 329,99 euros grâce à un code promo.

item.title: Ryan Coogler’s ‘X-Files’ Reboot Has Found Its Other Big Star
item.description: Plus, Amazon's 'God of War' show has found its Freya.

item.title: The Mashable-approved Shark Pet cordless vacuum is half off in Amazons Big Spring Sale — save over $150
item.description: The Shark Pet Cordless Vacuum is on sale at Amazon for $149, down from the list price of $299.99. That's a 50% discount.

item.title: Porsche Cayenne Electric Review: A Phenomenally Capable SUV
item.description: Porsche’s latest electric SUV is its most capable yet, and its most powerful street car ever. But should you wait for the hybrid instead?

item.title: iOS 26.4 age verification is proving a disaster for some users — here's how to fix it or stop the update
item.description: Age verification for Apple accounts is now mandatory if you're in the UK and use an iPhone or iPad.
